content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 8, 2002

Antonette Simarro
California Republican Party
1111 L Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-02-295

Dear Ms. Simarro:

This letter is in response to your request for information on general purpose and
candidate controlled committees under the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the
"Act").¹ Since you seek guidance as to what defines these committees, we treat your
letter as a general advice request under enclosed regulation 18329(c)(4)(C).

I have provided in this mailing a number of documents for your review, including
applicable statutes and previous advice letters requesting similar information.

Should you need further assistance from our agency, please contact me at (916)
322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

JWW:jg
Enclosures

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
